const section=data.find(item=>item["section-id"]==="hero-button");if(section){// Ustawianie wartości z pliku JSON

return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("a",{href:buttonHref,className:"hero-button-link",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"hero-button",children:buttonText})});};export default HeroButton;
